title: galium fruticosum var. citrinum
intro: Galium fruticosum var. citrinum, also known as the citrine bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium fruticosum plant, a species of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The citrine bedstraw has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and wounds, due to its health benefits, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Galium fruticosum var. citrinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
